title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search publishes a comprehensive news roundup covering 25+ AI tools and techniques. Featured items include 3D generation (Pixal3D, Articraft), world models (SANA-WM), language models (MiniCPM), text-to-speech (DramaBox), and ChatGPT updates including Finance and Codex on Phone capabilities.
